channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Campaign spending reaches $25 million in Massie-Gallrein race
item.description: A primary challenge to Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) has become the most expensive U.S. House race, with spending exceeding $25 million.

item.title: Trump and Rubio's rhetoric raises concerns about potential Cuban intervention
item.description: President Trump is intensifying pressure on Cuba, prompting concerns over the possibility of a U.S. intervention in the Caribbean.

item.title: Trump Supports Federal Gas Tax Suspension
item.description: President Trump expressed support for suspending the federal gasoline tax during a CBS News interview. The move represents a policy shift.

item.title: Johnson to address Senate Republicans
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson will speak to Senate Republicans, aiming to bridge divisions within the party.
